=== kri.common.models ===

enum ConfidenceFactor:
    API_CERTAINTY = 'api_certainty'
    CODE_SIMILARITY = 'code_similarity'
    DOCUMENTATION_SUPPORT = 'documentation_support'
    HISTORICAL_AGREEMENT = 'historical_agreement'
    REVIEW_HISTORY = 'review_history'
    RUNTIME_EVIDENCE = 'runtime_evidence'
    SUBSYSTEM_EVIDENCE = 'subsystem_evidence'
    VERSION_CONSISTENCY = 'version_consistency'

enum ConfidenceLevel:
    CERTAIN = 'certain'
    LIKELY = 'likely'
    POSSIBLE = 'possible'
    SPECULATIVE = 'speculative'
    UNKNOWN = 'unknown'

model ConfidenceScore:
    explanation: <class'str'> (required=False)
    factor_scores: dict[kri.common.models.ConfidenceFactor,float] (required=False)
    factor_weights: dict[kri.common.models.ConfidenceFactor,float] (required=False)
    level: <enum'ConfidenceLevel'> (required=True)
    score: <class'float'> (required=True)

model Decision:
    category: <class'str'> (required=False)
    confidence: kri.common.models.ConfidenceScore|None (required=False)
    decision_id: <class'str'> (required=True)
    evidence_graph: kri.common.models.EvidenceGraph|None (required=False)
    layer: <enum'ReasoningLayer'> (required=True)
    location: str|None (required=False)
    patch_id: str|None (required=False)
    pattern_id: str|None (required=False)
    rule_id: str|None (required=False)
    series_id: <class'str'> (required=True)
    severity: <enum'Severity'> (required=False)
    statement: <class'str'> (required=False)
    def is_publishable(self) -> 'bool'

value EVIDENCE_SOURCE_PRIORITY = {<EvidenceSourceType.DOCUMENTATION: 'documentation'>: 1, <EvidenceSourceType.MAINTAINERS_FILE: 'maintainers_file'>: 2, <EvidenceSourceType.API_HEADER: 'api_header'>: 3, <EvidenceSourceType.ACCEPTED_PATCH: 'accepted_patch'>: 4, <EvidenceSourceType.REJECTED_PATCH: 'rejected_patch'>: 5, <EvidenceSourceType.REVIEW_DISCUSSION: 'review_discussion'>: 6, <EvidenceSourceType.COMMIT_MESSAGE: 'commit_message'>: 7, <EvidenceSourceType.STATIC_ANALYSIS: 'static_analysis'>: 8, <EvidenceSourceType.BLAME_HISTORY: 'blame_history'>: 9, <EvidenceSourceType.CODE_SIMILARITY: 'code_similarity'>: 10, <EvidenceSourceType.MAINTAINER_BLOG: 'maintainer_blog'>: 11, <EvidenceSourceType.DESIGN_INFERENCE: 'design_inference'>: 12, <EvidenceSourceType.MISSING_SYMBOL: 'missing_symbol'>: 13, <EvidenceSourceType.MISSING_FILE: 'missing_file'>: 13, <EvidenceSourceType.MISSING_BINDING: 'missing_binding'>: 13}

model Evidence:
    bisectability_violation: <class'bool'> (required=False)
    dropped_reason: str|None (required=False)
    evidence_id: <class'str'> (required=True)
    patch_sequence: int|None (required=False)
    provenance: <class'kri.common.models.Provenance'> (required=True)
    source_type: <enum'EvidenceSourceType'> (required=True)
    strength: <class'float'> (required=False)
    summary: <class'str'> (required=False)
    symbol_ref: str|None (required=False)
    verified: <class'bool'> (required=False)
    version_range: kri.common.models.VersionRange|None (required=False)

model EvidenceGraph:
    accepted_examples: list[str] (required=False)
    alternative_precedents: list[str] (required=False)
    alternative_recommendation: str|None (required=False)
    comment_id: <class'str'> (required=True)
    evidence: list[kri.common.models.Evidence] (required=False)
    rejected_examples: list[str] (required=False)
    subsystem_rule: kri.common.models.Rule|None (required=False)
    def has_verified_evidence(self) -> 'bool'

enum EvidenceSourceType:
    ACCEPTED_PATCH = 'accepted_patch'
    API_HEADER = 'api_header'
    BLAME_HISTORY = 'blame_history'
    CODE_SIMILARITY = 'code_similarity'
    COMMIT_MESSAGE = 'commit_message'
    DESIGN_INFERENCE = 'design_inference'
    DOCUMENTATION = 'documentation'
    MAINTAINERS_FILE = 'maintainers_file'
    MAINTAINER_BLOG = 'maintainer_blog'
    MISSING_BINDING = 'missing_binding'
    MISSING_FILE = 'missing_file'
    MISSING_SYMBOL = 'missing_symbol'
    REJECTED_PATCH = 'rejected_patch'
    REVIEW_DISCUSSION = 'review_discussion'
    STATIC_ANALYSIS = 'static_analysis'

model KernelVersion:
    major: <class'int'> (required=True)
    minor: <class'int'> (required=True)
    patch: <class'int'> (required=False)
    raw: <class'str'> (required=True)
    rc: int|None (required=False)
    def sort_key(self) -> 'tuple[int, int, int, int]'

model KnowledgeStateId:
    created_at: <class'datetime.date'> (required=True)
    dkp_versions: dict[str,str] (required=False)
    ekg_schema_version: <class'str'> (required=True)
    learning_iteration: <class'int'> (required=False)
    runtime_version: <class'str'> (required=True)
    state_id: <class'str'> (required=True)

model Patch:
    author: str|None (required=False)
    commit_message: <class'str'> (required=False)
    diff: <class'str'> (required=False)
    files_changed: list[str] (required=False)
    patch_id: <class'str'> (required=True)
    sequence: <class'int'> (required=False)
    series_total: <class'int'> (required=False)
    subject: <class'str'> (required=True)

enum PatchOutcome:
    ACCEPTED = 'accepted'
    MODIFIED = 'modified'
    PENDING = 'pending'
    REJECTED = 'rejected'

model PatchSeries:
    cover_letter: <class'str'> (required=False)
    lore_thread_url: str|None (required=False)
    patches: list[kri.common.models.Patch] (required=False)
    provenance: <class'kri.common.models.Provenance'> (required=False)
    series_id: <class'str'> (required=True)
    target_kernel_version: kri.common.models.KernelVersion|None (required=False)
    title: <class'str'> (required=False)
    version: <class'int'> (required=False)

model Provenance:
    commit_hash: str|None (required=False)
    repo_path: str|None (required=False)
    retrieved_at: datetime.datetime|None (required=False)
    source_confidence: float|None (required=False)
    source_url: str|None (required=False)
    transformation_history: list[str] (required=False)
    version_or_commit: str|None (required=False)

enum ReasoningLayer:
    DESIGN = 'design'
    ECOSYSTEM = 'ecosystem'
    INTEGRATION = 'integration'
    MAINTAINABILITY = 'maintainability'
    SEMANTIC = 'semantic'
    STRUCTURAL = 'structural'

model ReviewComment:
    author: str|None (required=False)
    category: <class'str'> (required=False)
    comment_id: <class'str'> (required=True)
    is_maintainer: <class'bool'> (required=False)
    location: str|None (required=False)
    message: <class'str'> (required=False)
    provenance: <class'kri.common.models.Provenance'> (required=False)
    severity: <enum'Severity'> (required=False)
    target_patch_id: str|None (required=False)
    target_series_id: str|None (required=False)

model Rule:
    category: <class'str'> (required=False)
    description: <class'str'> (required=False)
    documentation_ref: str|None (required=False)
    exceptions: list[str] (required=False)
    historical_enforcement_rate: float|None (required=False)
    rationale: <class'str'> (required=False)
    rule_id: <class'str'> (required=True)
    rule_type: <enum'RuleType'> (required=False)
    version_range: kri.common.models.VersionRange|None (required=False)

enum RuleType:
    HARD = 'hard'
    PHILOSOPHICAL = 'philosophical'
    SOFT = 'soft'

model SeriesContext:
    deleted_files: dict[int,set[str]] (required=False)
    introduced_symbols: dict[int,set[str]] (required=False)
    kbuild_edits: dict[int,set[str]] (required=False)
    maintainers_deltas: dict[int,list[str]] (required=False)
    new_dt_compatibles: dict[int,set[str]] (required=False)
    new_files: dict[int,set[str]] (required=False)
    new_kconfig_symbols: dict[int,set[str]] (required=False)
    removed_symbols: dict[int,set[str]] (required=False)
    series_id: <class'str'> (required=True)
    target_kernel_version: kri.common.models.KernelVersion|None (required=False)
    used_symbols: dict[int,set[str]] (required=False)

enum Severity:
    BLOCKER = 'blocker'
    INFO = 'info'
    WARNING = 'warning'

model VersionRange:
    valid_from: <class'kri.common.models.KernelVersion'> (required=True)
    valid_until: kri.common.models.KernelVersion|None (required=False)

=== kri.common.interfaces ===

protocol ConfidenceEngine:
    def score(self, decision: 'Decision', evidence_graph: 'EvidenceGraph') -> 'ConfidenceScore'

protocol DomainKnowledgePackage:
    def build_target(self) -> 'str'
    def manifest(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
    def owns_file(self, path: 'str') -> 'bool'
    def patterns(self) -> 'list[Pattern]'
    def reasoning_plugins(self) -> 'list[ReasoningPlugin]'
    def rules(self, kernel_version: 'KernelVersion | None' = None) -> 'list[Rule]'
    def seed_graph(self, knowledge_manager: 'KnowledgeManager') -> 'None'
    def supports_version(self, kernel_version: 'KernelVersion') -> 'bool'
    property name
    property version

protocol EvidenceEngine:
    def format(self, evidence: 'Evidence') -> 'str'
    def gather(self, decision: 'Decision', *, series_context: 'SeriesContext | None' = None) -> 'EvidenceGraph'
    def verify(self, evidence: 'Evidence', *, series_context: 'SeriesContext | None' = None) -> 'Evidence'

protocol KernelBuilder:
    def build(self, target: 'str') -> 'dict[str, Any]'
    def configure(self, target: 'str', config: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'dict[str, Any]'
    def get_errors(self) -> 'list[str]'
    def get_warnings(self) -> 'list[str]'

protocol KnowledgeManager:
    def get_evidence(self, decision: 'Decision') -> 'list[Evidence]'
    def load_dkp(self, domain: 'str') -> 'DomainKnowledgePackage'
    def query_graph(self, query: 'GraphQuery') -> 'GraphResult'
    def restore(self, state_id: 'str') -> 'KnowledgeStateId'
    def snapshot(self) -> 'KnowledgeStateId'

protocol LearningEngine:
    def benchmark(self) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
    def ingest(self, thread: 'Any') -> 'list[Pattern]'
    def update_knowledge(self, pattern: 'Pattern') -> 'KnowledgeStateId'
    def validate(self, pattern: 'Pattern') -> 'dict[str, Any]'

protocol LoreManager:
    def extract_reviews(self, thread: 'Any') -> 'list[ReviewComment]'
    def fetch(self, thread_id: 'str') -> 'Any'
    def parse_conversation(self, thread: 'Any') -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'
    def search(self, query: 'str') -> 'list[str]'

protocol PatchManager:
    def correlate_reviews(self, series: 'PatchSeries') -> 'dict[str, list[ReviewComment]]'
    def extract_versions(self, series: 'PatchSeries') -> 'list[int]'
    def normalize(self, patch: 'Patch') -> 'Patch'
    def parse(self, thread: 'Any') -> 'PatchSeries'

protocol ReasoningPlugin:
    def applies(self, patch: 'Patch', series: 'PatchSeries') -> 'bool'
    def evaluate(self, patch: 'Patch', series: 'PatchSeries', *, series_context: 'SeriesContext | None' = None) -> 'list[Decision]'
    property plugin_id
    property trigger

protocol RepositoryManager:
    def apply_patch(self, series: 'PatchSeries') -> 'TreeState'
    def blame(self, file: 'str', line: 'int') -> 'list[dict[str, Any]]'
    def checkout(self, version: 'str') -> 'TreeState'
    def diff(self, commit_a: 'str', commit_b: 'str') -> 'Diff'

protocol ReviewEngine:
    def explain(self, decision: 'Decision') -> 'EvidenceGraph'
    def generate_report(self, decisions: 'list[Decision]') -> 'ReviewReport'
    def review(self, patch_series: 'PatchSeries', dkp: 'DomainKnowledgePackage | None', extra_plugins: "list['ReasoningPlugin'] | None" = None) -> 'list[Decision]'

protocol SimulationEngine:
    def audit(self, report: 'ReviewReport') -> 'dict[str, Any]'
    def replay(self, patch_series: 'PatchSeries', knowledge_state: 'str') -> 'ReviewReport'
    def simulate(self, patch_series: 'PatchSeries', config: 'dict[str, Any]') -> 'ReviewReport'

protocol StaticAnalysisManager:
    def normalize(self, output: 'Any') -> 'list[StaticFinding]'
    def run_checkpatch(self, patch: 'Patch') -> 'list[StaticFinding]'
    def run_coccinelle(self, files: 'list[str]', scripts: 'list[str]') -> 'list[StaticFinding]'
    def run_smatch(self, files: 'list[str]') -> 'list[StaticFinding]'
    def run_sparse(self, files: 'list[str]') -> 'list[StaticFinding]'
